title: [NFC][ImportVerilog] Clean up unnecessary hierarchical expr visitor
body:
Follow up to #10097 to merge the two visitors, since inheriting from ASTVisitor means that all the visiting can be handled by the same visitor much more cleanly. 

(The GitHub diff is a little misleading on this since most of the code got moved down in the file so it uses that as the anchor, this just moves the handler in HierPathValueExprVisitor into InstBodyVisitor and drops HierPathValueExprVisitor)
